name: All Documents Sidebar Link
uri: client-side only — no route change; sets activeSection='documents' in App state
notes: Rendered inside a sections.map() loop at Sidebar.jsx:44; the 'documents' entry is the first item in the sections array (index 0) with id='documents' and label='📁 All Documents'.
onClick evaluates onNavigate && onNavigate('documents') — the guard prevents a TypeError when the prop is omitted.
Active styling is applied inline: when App.state.activeSection === 'documents', navItemActiveStyle (background #0f3460, white text) is used instead of navItemStyle.

The Sidebar exposes 4 nav targets (documents, upload, search, tags); the Header nav exposes only 3 (documents, upload, search). Both surfaces set the same App.state.activeSection field via the same App.handleNavigate handler.
